item.title: Might not be unpopular here.
item.description: Edit: Holy shit! I didn't think my dumb post would hit front page.
item.dc:creator: Sulcatasaredope2

item.title: Vegetables do not exist.
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Life achievement unlocked!
item.description: I had to go to a court hearing because my state is dumb, but my district’s judge is the chillest dude on the fucking plane. It was a group hearing and he started with “everyone take a deep breath; I’ve already signed all your orders, but I’m required to do this hearing so I just want to get to know you all a little better.”
item.dc:creator: honkems

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i'm in danger.. greeting online friends
I believe former VP Dick Cheney had a similar mishap
that poor man
at least its a salad and not a tastier option
this news has shocked and befuddled me
obviously
fish tanks are the coolest have always wanted one
no brainer
always
finally
mmm hmm
looks like AI somehow
gotta keep em wet
at least take me out to dinner first!
the time is now
as is tradition
great question has anyone looked into this?
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Dumpin' memes and closin' tabs pt. 5 ft. Liam
item.description:
Me @ anyone. Gentle reminder to take your meds and hydrate. "Investigation" doesn't mean watching youtube. "Research" doesn't mean paraphrasing people who said what you already believe.
Me, talking to my toddler brain like I would anyone else: HEY! Have you considered shutting the fuck up and just doing it? It has worked _SO_ many times! There you go. Just do the thing, you stupid fuck. And my toddler brain cries, and the thing gets done anyway. This isn't healthy, and I wouldn't particularly recommend it to anyone else; I'm very much a product of my past.
I recently saw a cy8er7ruck in the wild. I somehow managed to not flip them the bird.
I know exactly one sentence in Italian, but this seems like a good reason to become fluent.
Why you gotta call me out like this, meme?!?! But seriously, I've long held the belief that there's no such thing as adults, just children in bigger bodies.
Talky-bara
Time to make that someone else's problem.
When I want to sleep, I don't change clothes, I just... remove most of what's on me. I'm a hot sleeper. Too much insulation and I overheat, and then I get nightmares. I don't pretend to know how it works, but I can pick up on patterns.
If the atmosphere keeps absorbing more heat, this Eden you were charged with keeping will be its own Hell. Last I checked, sucking [REDACTED] doesn't put any significant amount of greenhouse gases into the air.
I believe in scientific thinking, even as I recognize that science doesn't have all the answers yet, and might never have all the answers. I think the evidence is very much in my favor, with regards to these beliefs.
No comment.
If you don't abuse your pet, your pet probably misses you. Please pet them for me. Or just tell them that they're loved, if they're not the petting-type of pet. (Like... a fish? IDK)
FUCK! Is THAT why I like it?! I want a burger now...
How did that bunny get in that tree? What is it looking at? I just want to ask it my questions while gently petting it. IS THAT SO MUCH TO ASK
What's the genre when I'm resigned to past, present, and future, and just want to start a community that employs everyone, grows its own food, and doesn't rely on fossil fuels?
I will not be judged by Drake. I will ruthlessly judge myself, thank you very much.
No. Wrong. Isabelle shouldn't have a dialogue box. There should just be text saying "click-clack" for her weapon.
My spirit animal.
Sounds good; doesn't work. Love and sexuality aren't equivalent. God allegedly impregnated exactly one person, and hasn't fucked since then. Ultimate incel energy.
Joke's on you, I can get things done WITHOUT pants on.
I think this monk has more than just tea in that tea.
I love this creechur.
Light a candle or something, jeez.
Smooches will be delivered by force if necessary.
Everybody's got a plan until they die of hypothermia. Remember, kids: you aren't dead until you're dead and warm. Or until you're dismembered in order to further the survival of your fellow party members.
What do we call the idiots that are doing it again now? USAboos?
What's with the little heel pops?
I'm not going to stop reading stuff, bigot. There seems to be a direct correlation between "ability and willingness to read" and "not being the absolute worst." Guess which side of that scale you're providing a data point for?
Now with sound
Idk, plant more fucking plants, bitch. You could've just waited for them to want to move on their own. They would've gladly left everything they'd planted then. Absolute wanker.
I bet the business end of that calculator was hot to the touch, and warm to an @duckalet belly.
The Thing is Frank. Torch is obviously Charlie. Not shown: Mac.
My favorite scene from one of my favorite movies. You people are weird.
I love almost all corvids. Scrub jays get on my nerves, though. Don't know why.
Mine actually isn't ominous. Weird.
With a knife. Yeah. With a knife. BIGGER knife. FUCKIN KNIFE! For the uninitiated: https://youtu.be/LbWAFu3H3rw?si=T0MP_UunqLGX02ve
I'd gladly join my own search party before I answered a call from a number I didn't recognize. Sweet baby Thor, I hate campaign season. SO MUCH SPAM!
This isn't peak performance unless you're betting on Fat Bear Week. That right there is a chonkosaur. Hekn... Chungosaurus Rex. Dang ol'... obese bear.
I know someone like this. I ain't gonna name names, though.
Now I have a couple relatives that I want to ask about this.
You better watch out, or I'll shlap you with my jatana! Plap! It'll kinda sting! For, like.... a little while!
The power of wine compels you!
Now imagine humanity trying to translate alien euphemisms into earthly languages. And, AND the likelihood that by the time we meet up with aliens, humanity will probably have already differentiated into multi-planetary unique groups, a-la The Expanse! It can oxidize on my anus.
Come cuddle with me, gato. I don't mind a bit.
I haven't noticed women hitting on me when I wear a ring, but I talk about my wife just about every chance I get, so... idk. Do with that what you will.
Why is this so endearing to me? Why do I care so much about a crab and her corn?! Don't take her corn from her! JUST LET HER EAT!!
I recently had to replace my phone because it wouldn't hold enough charge to function for 3 thor-zap hours in a day, and now, not only do I have to LOG IN to every fucking app all over again, but my usual gestures don't do anything, and my phone now automatically adds spaces after punctuation! This. Shit. Is. Broken. I hate it. I just want what I had before. It can't be that much to ask, because we, as a society, made it back when technology was LESS sophisticated! Fuck, fuckity fuck-fuck-fuck.
Mm. Yeah, I sure hope she doesn't.
I'll be the one making them. I've accepted my role in this crazy, mixed-up universe. I make-a da grillcheez, and I boil-a da suup. It's simple work, but it's honest. I also do math from time to time.
The perfect confluence of means, motive, and opportunity. What'cha wanna bet that this gets removed by mods for being mature? I stole it straight from a dump that was on the front page, you prudes. Either enforce your standards with some consistency or get out of the way so the rest of us can live our lives!
Geese make good jerky.
Gently limck and monch the creechur. After you get consent.
Spinmachine goes BRRRRRRRRRT
NOOOOOOOO, someone feed him! My poor idiot child! You cannot eat the bowl!
I swear, I haven't seen one instance of a video paired up with this music where it hasn't been hands-down adorable. Butterfly! Why are you bonking that capertiller?! Rude! poik poik poik
The critter.... it grooves. It GROOVES! LOOK AT THAT LITL BUTT WIGGLE AND TELL ME YOU DON'T LOVE IT! You can't do it.
The guinea big stalks the mini-wheeks.
I have no mouth, yet I must... *checks notes* ... eat... plastic? Fuck that. *DSL connection noises*
We live in a universe where there are whole classes of animals that have no idea what an email is, and have never dedicated one single neuron to answering them, or even stressing about them at all. And I think that's pretty cool.
It's called ENRICHMENT and it's IMPORTANT to have mental STIMULATION!!!
I'd say 15 to 20 percent less god, but that's just a personal guess. Pure speculation on my part, and I can be wrong. Done it before, and will no doubt do it again in the future.
Fuuuuuuuck you, guy. Goddamn fuckin... sleep schedules. *angry grumbling*
Please do not disturb this critter. It is in a situation of its own devising, and does not require rescue. Photography is allowed, but we recommend you disable your flash.
This gato, hims screms real good-like. 10/10, would pet.
They have to stab themselves with an identical needle right beforehand so you can know it's legit. "Yup, that's a 5. Hold still."
I'll be honest, I only recognized the line form of Scholarly Ignorance. All the rest were foreign to me. I would fail the future Past Meme Studies class. Maybe? Idk.
I love it. Every damn time I see it. Whoever that first lil guy is, I hope he's still out there killing it just like he is here.
Gato. Why are you like this.
I am honored.
Hopefully some lab safety procedures. WHERE THE FUCK ARE YOUR GOGGLES?!
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne

item.title: Phone dump
item.description:
Guilty.
All chics need this.
The family's reaction lol
Yup.

item.title: Images of Note: Acid horse
item.description:
Ok but it slaps though
I mean it works.
It's because the media largely supports the Tories.
give it back.
that looks comfy
The idea of forcing teenagers, who largely wake up later, to go to school at the part of the day where they're least able to learn will never fail to horrify me.
Well.
What
Oh no.
Whee
It's always valid to Deez Nuts the Taliban
I need this for Eric
Yeah this is Spock
AAAAAAAAAAAA
The more I learn about what is happening in Windows the more I'm happy I switched to Linux Mint.
Well this is....a good way to promote organ donation.
Look at them, they're enthralled.
Amazing
https://www.tumblr.com/yamujiburo Jessie x Delia is the best ship
Do not underestimate the determination of toddlers.
Oh my my
You joke but...
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For Streams: http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: MyAnimeList 2024 v1.1 (Alphabetical)
item.description:
MyAnimeList 2024 v.1.1. English Titles. Alphabetical. Visit myanimelist.net for ratings, reviews and synopses.
A Silent Voice (2016)
Air (2005) Air the Motion Picture (2005)
Akira (1988)
Angel Beats (2010)
Angel Cop (1989)
Animatrix, The (2003)
Anohana The Flower We Saw That Day (2011)
Another (2012)
Appleseed (1988)
Appleseed (2004) Appleseed Ex Machina (2007)
Appleseed Alpha (2015)
Armitage III (1995) Armitage Dual Matrix (2002)
Battle Angel Alita (1993)
Berserk (1997)
Birdy the Mighty (1996)
Birdy the Mighty Decode (2008) Birdy the Mighty Decode (2009) Birdy the Mighty Decode 02 (2009)
Black Lagoon (2006) Black Lagoon The Second Barrage (2006) Black Lagoon Roberta's Blood Trail (2010)
Black Magic M-66 (1987)
Blue Gender (1999)
Blue Submarine No. 6 (1998)
Bubblegum Crisis (1987) Bubblegum Crash (1991) - AD Police Files (1990) AD Police TV (AD Police To Protect and Serve) (1999)
Bubblegum Crisis Tokyo 2040 (1998)
Castle in the Sky (1986)
Charlotte (2015)
Chobits (2002)
Clannad (2007) Clannad After Story (2008)
Claymore (2007)
Code Geass Lelouch of the Rebellion R1 (2006) Code Geass Lelouch of the Rebellion R2 (2008)
Cowboy Bebop (1998) Cowboy Bebop The Movie (2001)
Crest of the Stars (1998) Banner of the Stars (2000) Banner of the Stars (2001) Banner of the Stars (2005)
Cyber Cite Oedo 808 (1990)
Darker Than Black (2007) Darker Than Black Gemini of the Meteor (2009) Darker Than Black Gemini of the Meteor Gaiden (2010)
Death Note (2006)
Death Parade (2015) ~ Death Billiards (2013)
Demon City (1988)
Den-noh Coil (2007)
Dirty Pair (1985) Dirty Pair Affair on Nolandia (1985) Dirty Pair With Love From the Lovely Angels (1987) Dirty Pair (1987) Dirty Pair Project Eden (1987) Dirty Pair Flight 005 Conspiracy (1990)
Dominion Tank Police (1988) New Dominion Tank Police (1993) plus more
Dot Hack Sign (2002) (.hack//Sign)
Eden of the East (2009) Eden of The East the Movie I The King of Eden (2009) Eden of The East the Movie II Paradise Lost (2010)
Elfen Lied (2004)
Erased (2016)
Ergo Proxy (2006)
Eureka Seven (2005) Eureka Seven AO (2012)
Fate Stay Night (2006) Fate Zero (2011) Fate Zero 2 (2012) - Fate Stay Night Unlimited Blade Works (2014) Fate Stay Night Unlimited Blade Works 2 (2015) - Fate Stay Night Heaven's Feel I Presage Flower (2017) Fate Stay Night Heaven's Feel II Lost Butterfly (2019) Fate Stay Night Heaven's Feel III Spring Song (2020) - plus more
Five Centimeters Per Second (2007)
From the New World (2012)
Fruits Basket (2019) Fruits Basket 2 (2020) Fruits Basket Final (2021) ~ Fruits Basket (2001)
Full Metal Panic (2002) Full Metal Panic Fumoffu (2003) Full Metal Panic The 2nd Raid (2005) Full Metal Panic Invisible Victory (2018)
Fullmetal Alchemist (2004) Fullmetal Alchemist The Movie Conqueror of Shamballa (2005)
Fullmetal Alchemist Brotherhood (2009) Fullmetal Alchemist The Sacred Star of Milos (2011)
Gall Force Eternal Story (1986) Gall Force Destruction (1987) Gall Force Stardust War (1988) Rhea Gall Force (1989) Gall Force Earth Chapter (1989) Gall Force New Era (1991)
Gargantia on the Verduous Planet (2013)
Gate (2015) Gate 2 (2016)
Ghost in the Shell (1995) Ghost in the Shell 2 Innocence (2004)
Ghost in the Shell Stand Alone Complex (2003) Ghost in the Shell Stand Alone Complex 2nd GIG (2004) Ghost in the Shell Stand Alone Complex Solid State Society (2006)
Girl Who Leapt Through Time, The (2006)
Girl's Last Tour (2017)
Goku Midnight Eye (1989)
Golden Boy (1995)
Grave of the Fireflies (1988)
Great Teach Onizuka (1999)
Gunbuster (1988) Diebuster (2004)
Gunsmith Cats (1995)
Gurren Lagann (Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann) (2007)
Halo Legends (2009)
Horimiya (2021)
Howl's Moving Castle (2004)
I Want to Eat Your Pancreas (2018)
Initial D First Stage (1998) Initial D Second Stage (2000) Initial D Third Stage (2001) Initial D Extra Stage (2001) Initial D Fourth Stage (2004) Initial D Extra Stage 2 (2008) Initial D Fifth Stage (2012) Initial D Final Stage (2014)
Iria Zieram the Animation (1994)
Irresponsible Captain Tylor, The (1993) Irresponsible Captain Tylor, The (1994)
Jin-Roh the Wolf Brigade (2000)
Kaguya-sama Love is War (2019) Kaguya-sama Love is War Season 2 (2020) Kaguya-sama Love is War Ultra Romantic (2022) Kaguya-sama Love is War The First Kiss That Never Ends (2022)
Kanon (2006) ~ Kanon (2002)
Key the Metal Idol (1994)
Kids on the Slope (2012)
Kiki's Delivery Service (1989)
Log Horizon (2013) Log Horizon 2 (2014) Log Horizon Destruction of the Round Table (2021)
Macross (1982) (Robotech) plus more - Macross Do You Remember Love? (1984)
Made In Abyss (2017) Made in Abyss Dawn of the Deep Soul (2020) Made in Abyss The Golden City of the Scorching Sun (2022)
Mardock Scramble The First Compression (2010) Mardock Scramble The Second Combustion (2011) Mardock Scramble The Third Exhaust (2012)
Martian Successor Nadesico (1996)

Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya, The (2006) Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya 2, The (2009) Disappearance of Haruhi Suzumiya, The (2010)
Memories (1995)
Metropolis (2001)

My Neighbor Totoro (1988)

Ninja Scroll (1993)
Orange (2016)

Paprika (2006)

Stein's;Gate (2011) Stein's;Gate Egoistic Poriomania (2012) Stein's;Gate The Movie Load Region of Déjà Vu (2013) Stein's;Gate Open the Missing Link Divide By Zero (2015) Stein's;Gate 0 (2018)

Terror in Resonance (Terror in Tokyo) (2014)
Texhnolyze (2003)
Toradora (2008)

item.title: All State is whack
item.description: Even the police report didn’t fault me for anything. The letter this guy’s insurance company sent me was like “We find that (my name) was partially liable for the accident by %. Here’s $700 for a rental.” They didn’t even write what % I was supposedly liable for lol. My brother sent them a terrifying letter threatening to sue and they instantly changed their mind.
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: I need 4 of these, exactly like this one. Calathea Couture.
item.dc:creator: sonotsurprised

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1254
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/0IuCs1v Wholesome Post 1253 https://imgur.com/gallery/09G6I82 Wholesome Post 1252 https://imgur.com/gallery/VnM5nLm Wholesome Post 1251 https://imgur.com/gallery/sU4VNu4 Wholesome Post 1250 https://imgur.com/gallery/7bXhXfY Wholesome Post 1249 https://imgur.com/gallery/0KxdbC9 Wholesome Post 1248 https://imgur.com/gallery/Osq2H5y Wholesome Post 1247
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help https://www.gofundme.com/f/needing-help-due-to-flesh-eating-disorder
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48

item.title: It is impossible to break this ice
item.dc:creator: Offernedis

item.title: Latte is King of the quiet meow
item.description: Foster kitten Latte opens his mouth to meow every ten seconds or so. But he only ever actually meows once in a while. He’s got a lot to say, but doesn’t wanna overwhelm me. I very much appreciate that, Latte. I missed you, baby boy.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: I’m gonna make you love me
item.description: Ever since I got back from being out of the country a couple of days ago, foster kitten Espresso has been pretty stand-offish. She’ll let me pet her, and she’s curious about my lap, but she runs from me when I walk towards her and shies away from my hand. But I sat still for a while tonight and she came right to me. Oooh, baby Girl, imma make you love me!! And isn’t she GORGEOUS??
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: I'm in the wrong business
item.description: Aydan Conrad, a Twitch streamer and a Fortnite professional player decided to surprise his mother by paying off all of her remaining student loans. Good on you Aydan!
